Package iofXml.v3

package iofXml.v3
  • Class
    Description
    Account
    The bank account of an organisation or an event.
    Address
    The postal address of a person or organisation.
    Amount
    Defines a monetary amount.
    AssignedFee
    Contains information about a fee that has been assigned to a competitor or a team, and the amount that has been paid.
    BaseMessageElement
    The base message element that all message elements extend.
    Class
    Defines a class in an event.
    ClassCourseAssignment
    Element that connects a course with a class.
    ClassList
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    ClassResult
    The result list for a single class containing either individual results or team results.
    ClassStart
    The start list of a single class containing either individual start times or team start times.
    ClassType
    Defines a class type, which is used to group classes in categories.
    Competitor
    Represents information about a person in a competition context, i.e.
    CompetitorList
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    Contact
    Contact information for a person, organisation or other entity.
    Control
    Defines a control, without any relationship to a particular course.
    ControlAnswer
    Defines the the selected answer, the correct answer and the time used on a Trail-O control.
    ControlCard
    The unique identifier of the control card, i.e.
    ControlCardList
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    ControlType
    The type of a control: (ordinary) control, start, finish, crossing point or end of marked route.
    Country
    Defines the name of the country.
    Course
    Defines a course, i.e.
    CourseControl
    A control included in a particular course.
    CourseData
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    DateAndOptionalTime
    Defines a point in time which either is known by date and time, or just by date.
    EntryList
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    EntryReceiver
    Java class for EntryReceiver complex type
    Event
    Java class for Event complex type
    EventClassification
    Java class for EventClassification
    EventClassStatus
    The status of the class.
    EventForm
    Java class for EventForm
    EventList
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    EventStatus
    Java class for EventStatus
    EventURL
    Java class for EventURL complex type
    Extensions
    Container element that is used to add custom elements from other schemas.
    Fee
    A fee that applies when entering a class at a race or ordering a service.
    GeoPosition
    Defines a geographical position, e.g.
    Id
    Identifier element, used extensively.
    Image
    Defines an image file, either as a link (use the url attribute) or as base64-encoded binary data.
    InformationItem
    Defines a general-purpose information object containing a title and content.
    IofV3
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    LanguageString
    Defines a text that is given in a particular language.
    Leg
    Defines extra information for a relay leg.
    Map
    Map information, used in course setting software with regard to the "real" map.
    MapPosition
    Defines a position in a map's coordinate system.
    ObjectFactory
    This object contains factory methods for each Java content interface and Java element interface generated in the iofXml.v3 package.
    Organisation
    Information about an organisation, i.e.
    OrganisationList
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    OrganisationServiceRequest
    Service requests made by an organisation.
    OverallResult
    Java class for OverallResult complex type
    Person
    Represents a person.
    PersonCourseAssignment
    Element that connects a course with an individual competitor.
    PersonEntry
    Defines an event entry for a person.
    PersonName
    Java class for PersonName complex type
    PersonRaceResult
    Result information for a person in a race.
    PersonRaceStart
    Start information for a person in a race.
    PersonResult
    Result information for an individual competitor, including e.g.
    PersonServiceRequest
    Service requests made by a person.
    PersonStart
    Start information for an individual competitor, including e.g.
    Race
    An event consists of a number of races.
    RaceClass
    Information about a class with respect to a race.
    RaceClassStatus
    The status of a certain race in the class.
    RaceCourseData
    This element defines all the control and course information for a race.
    RaceDiscipline
    Java class for RaceDiscipline
    ResultList
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    ResultStatus
    The result status of the person or team at the time of the result generation.
    Role
    A role defines a connection between a person and some kind of task, responsibility or engagement, e.g.
    Route
    Defines a route, i.e.
    Schedule
    Defines the schedule of sub-events that comprise the entire orienteering event, e.g.
    Score
    The score earned in an event for some purpose, e.g.
    Service
    Defines a general purpose service request, e.g.
    ServiceRequest
    Java class for ServiceRequest complex type
    ServiceRequestList
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    SimpleCourse
    Defines a course, excluding controls.
    SimpleRaceCourse
    Defines a course for a certain race, excluding controls.
    SplitTime
    Defines a split time at a control.
    StartList
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    StartName
    Defines the name of the start place (e.g.
    StartTimeAllocationRequest
    Used to state start time allocation requests.
    TeamCourseAssignment
    Element that connects a number of team members in a relay team to a number of courses.
    TeamEntry
    Defines an event entry for a team.
    TeamEntryPerson
    Defines a person that is part of a team entry.
    TeamMemberCourseAssignment
    Element that connects a course with a relay team member.
    TeamMemberRaceResult
    Result information for a person in a race.
    TeamMemberRaceResult.Position
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    TeamMemberRaceResult.TimeBehind
    Java class for anonymous complex type
    TeamMemberRaceStart
    Start information for a team member in a race.
    TeamMemberResult
    Result information for a team member, including e.g.
    TeamMemberStart
    Start information for an individual competitor, including e.g.
    TeamResult
    Result information for a team, including e.g.
    TeamStart
